Chair Rentals in Mahone Bay NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals offers chair rentals for events in Mahone Bay NS. Black padded folding chairs are available at $3 each, with 15 in our inventory. White folding chairs are available by request. Chairs can be added to any inflatable rental, foam party, 360 Photo Booth booking, lawn games, or party package — or rented standalone by quote.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. We serve Mahone Bay NS and surrounding areas. Availability, quantity, delivery, and final pricing are confirmed manually based on your event date, location, and order size.

Best For

  • Birthday parties
  • School events and fun days
  • Community events
  • Backyard parties
  • Graduations and family events

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you offer chair rentals in Mahone Bay?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals offers chair rentals in Mahone Bay NS. Black padded folding chairs are available at $3 each, with 15 in our inventory. White folding chairs are available by request. Contact us to confirm availability and pricing for your event date.
What types of chairs are available to rent?
Black padded folding chairs are available at $3 each, with 15 in our inventory. White folding chairs are available by request starting at $3 each.
Can I add chairs to an inflatable or package rental?
Yes. Chairs are available as add-ons with inflatable rentals, foam parties, 360 Photo Booth bookings, lawn games, and party packages. Mention your chair needs when requesting your booking.
Can I rent chairs near Mahone Bay without an inflatable?
Yes. Standalone chair rentals are available by quote for events in Mahone Bay NS. A minimum rental order applies before travel. Contact us with your event date, location, and number of chairs needed.
Is booking confirmed after I submit the form?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Availability, quantity, delivery, and final pricing are confirmed manually before your rental is finalized.

Book chair rentals for your Mahone Bay event
